name: wilson-prefs
description: User preferences (reply language / code language / response style) settable via the /wilson-prefs:prefs slash command, persisted to plugin data, and injected into context. SessionStart / PostCompact inject the full `## Prefs` block including the style file body (PostCompact lands in the clean post-summary context, where the rules are guaranteed present); every Nth UserPromptSubmit turn (configurable via `refresh-every`, default 10) refreshes that full body, and every other turn injects the compact always-on micro-spec so the style never decays to a bare label between refreshes. With an explicit reply language the contradictory `_common` language-tracking section is stripped before injection and the `## Prefs` directive lines are localized to that language so the steering text reads in its own tongue. Standalone port of wilson's prefs plugin.
